BaseApi/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the JDK 11 migration.
BaseApi/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build will compile against Java 8 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 11 compatibility requirements.

BaseApi/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency version to a newer release compatible with the target environment.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.general_idea: Replace deprecated BigDecimal.ROUND_HALF_UP constant with RoundingMode.HALF_UP to comply with Java 9+ API changes.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.why_exists: Compile error: BigDecimal.ROUND_HALF_UP was removed in Java 9; code fails to compile on Java 11.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.general_idea: Add import for java.math.RoundingMode to support the replacement of the deprecated constant.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.why_exists: Compile error: Cannot resolve symbol RoundingMode without the import.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and thread safety.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.general_idea: Add isWrapperFor method to implement JDBC 4.2 Wrapper interface required in Java 11.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.why_exists: AbstractRoutingDataSource no longer implements Wrapper in Java 11 JDBC drivers, causing compile errors for missing abstract method implementation.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.after: public boolean isWrapperFor(Class<?> iface) throws java.sql.SQLException { return iface != null && iface.isAssignableFrom(this.getClass()); }

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.general_idea: Add unwrap method to implement JDBC 4.2 Wrapper interface required in Java 11.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.why_exists: AbstractRoutingDataSource no longer implements Wrapper in Java 11 JDBC drivers, causing compile errors for missing abstract method implementation.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.after: public <T> T unwrap(Class<T> iface) throws java.sql.SQLException { ... }

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.general_idea: Add getParentLogger method to implement JDBC 4.1 Wrapper interface required in Java 11.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.why_exists: AbstractRoutingDataSource no longer implements Wrapper in Java 11 JDBC drivers, causing compile errors for missing abstract method implementation.
